title: GTMoreTools
description: Cross-mod tool integration add-on for GregTech CEu.
body:
# GTMoreTools

**GTMoreTools** is an add-on for [GregTech CEu](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gregtech-ce-unofficial) that extends the tool system with cross-mod integrations.

By installing the supported mods listed below, you can receive various tool and machine integrations.
All tools use the GregTech material system, meaning they can be crafted from any GT material with full durability and stat scaling.

This mod can be used as part of a ModPack or standalone.

## Features

### Storage Drawers Integration
Requires: [Storage Drawers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/storage-drawers)

- Add GT material-based Storage Upgrades.

### Chisel Integration
Requires: [Chisel](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chisel)

- Adds **GT material-based Chisel tools** that function as Chisel mod chisels
- Chisel tools inherit GregTech material properties (durability, tier, etc.)
- Adds the **Auto Chisel** machine for automated block chiseling
  - Available from LV tier and above
  - Supports parallel processing that scales with voltage tier

### Better Builder's Wands Integration
Requires: [Better Builder's Wands](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-builders-wands)

- Adds **GT material-based Wand tools** that function as Builder's Wands
- Wand tools inherit GregTech material properties (durability, tier, etc.)

### Tinkers' Construct Integration
Requires: [Tinkers' Antique](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tinkers-antique)

- For full details, see [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/GTModpackTeam/GTMoreTools/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)

- CEu tool materials are automatically registered as TiC materials (Head, Handle, Extra, Bow, Arrow Shaft)
- Traits are automatically assigned from GT material properties (Holy, Heat Resistant, Cryogenic, Anti-Corrosion, etc.)
- Molten fluid and smeltery casting/melting support for CEu materials
- Dual-tool mining with GT tool + TiC tool cross-hand combinations

## Requirements
- Minecraft 1.12.2
- [GregTech CEu](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gregtech-ce-unofficial) (Required)
- [MixinBooter](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mixin-booter) (Required)

## Optional Dependencies
- [Storage Drawers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/storage-drawers)
- [Chisel](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chisel) — For Chisel integration
- [Better Builder's Wands](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-builders-wands) — For Wand integration
- [Tinkers' Antique](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tinkers-antique) — For Tools integration
